conflict: Agnes's wrongful institutionalization and the waste of her 42-year pharmaceutical career
consequence: Carmen's assumption that the residents are vulnerable or impaired collapses; Agnes is the most competent person in the building and the ring has internal pharmaceutical ethics
must_land_beats: Agnes's career: 42 years at the same Walgreens in Edison
The stroke, Helen's panic, the house sold, the placement
Agnes's six months of fighting back — letters, calls, demands — and the surrender into performance
Agnes's pharmaceutical ethics within the ring: tracking expirations, flagging interactions, refusing dangerous sales (Burt's fentanyl patches)
Agnes drops the act: 'Stop performing your own dilemma and come see what we actually do'
pressure_source: Agnes's wrongful institutionalization and the waste of her 42-year pharmaceutical career
secondary_character_beats: Helen is rendered with specificity — her visits with the grandchildren, the slow loud voice she uses, the guilt she doesn't recognize as guilt

setups_to_plant.description: Agnes's meticulous pharmaceutical notebooks — her records of the operation, buyer needs, drug interactions — are established as both the operation's brain and its most damning evidence

state_shift: Carmen's assumption that the residents are vulnerable or impaired collapses; Agnes is the most competent person in the building and the ring has internal pharmaceutical ethics
